datapoints.description: Total cluster raw capacity in bytes
datapoints.name: total_bytes

datapoints.description: Client read throughput in bytes per second
datapoints.name: read_bytes_per_sec

datapoints.description: Client write throughput in bytes per second

description: Cluster-wide Ceph health status, storage capacity, and client I/O metrics via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Collects cluster-level Ceph metrics from Thanos using aggregate PromQL with vector(0) fallbacks. ceph_client_io_read_bytes and ceph_client_io_write_bytes are already per-second rates from the Ceph MGR Prometheus module.
name: ODF_Ceph_Cluster_Overview
